title: Facebook, Citing Societal Concerns, Plans to Shut Down Facial Recognition System
content: Saying it wants “to find the right balance” with the technology, the social network will delete the face scan data of more than one billion users.

more_info.byline: By Kashmir Hill and Ryan Mac

en_title: Facebook, Citing Societal Concerns, Plans to Shut Down Facial Recognition System
en_content: Saying it wants “to find the right balance” with the technology, the social network will delete the face scan data of more than one billion users.

title: As the Fed Prepares to Slow Support, Attention Shifts to Rate Increases
content: The Federal Reserve is expected to announce a plan to taper off its bond buying. With inflation surging, economists’ eyes are already turning to rates.
en_title: As the Fed Prepares to Slow Support, Attention Shifts to Rate Increases
en_content: The Federal Reserve is expected to announce a plan to taper off its bond buying. With inflation surging, economists’ eyes are already turning to rates.

title: Corporate Climate Pledges Often Ignore a Key Component: Supply Chains
content: Many companies do not account for the emissions from their supply chains, which can be a significant majority of their contributions to greenhouse gases.

more_info.byline: By Michael Corkery and Julie Creswell
des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: Corporate Climate Pledges Often Ignore a Key Component: Supply Chains
en_content: Many companies do not account for the emissions from their supply chains, which can be a significant majority of their contributions to greenhouse gases.

title: Another Apple Worker Says the Company Retaliated Against Her
content: One of the leaders of an activist movement at Apple took her complaint to a federal agency, marking an escalation of a conflict between Apple and some of its workers.
en_title: Another Apple Worker Says the Company Retaliated Against Her
en_content: One of the leaders of an activist movement at Apple took her complaint to a federal agency, marking an escalation of a conflict between Apple and some of its workers.

title: How Car Shortages Are Putting the World’s Economy at Risk
content: Because so many jobs depend on automaking, the industry’s production problems are causing the pain to ripple.

more_info.byline: By Jack Ewing and Patricia Cohen

en_title: How Car Shortages Are Putting the World’s Economy at Risk
en_content: Because so many jobs depend on automaking, the industry’s production problems are causing the pain to ripple.

title: As Demand for Green Energy Grows, Solar Farms Face Local Resistance
content: Developers say industrial-scale farms are needed to meet the nation’s climate goals, but locals are fighting back against what they see as an encroachment on their pastoral settings.
en_title: As Demand for Green Energy Grows, Solar Farms Face Local Resistance
en_content: Developers say industrial-scale farms are needed to meet the nation’s climate goals, but locals are fighting back against what they see as an encroachment on their pastoral settings.

title: How the Pandemic Has Added to Labor Unrest
content: While big companies wield considerable power, Covid’s economic disruption has given workers new leverage, contributing to a recent upturn in strikes.

org_facet: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees

en_title: How the Pandemic Has Added to Labor Unrest
en_content: While big companies wield considerable power, Covid’s economic disruption has given workers new leverage, contributing to a recent upturn in strikes.

title: Europe Fears That Rising Cost of Climate Action Is Stirring Anger
content: Memories of the Yellow Vest movement are prompting officials to ensure that spiking energy prices don’t fuel inequality or populist discontent.
en_title: Europe Fears That Rising Cost of Climate Action Is Stirring Anger
en_content: Memories of the Yellow Vest movement are prompting officials to ensure that spiking energy prices don’t fuel inequality or populist discontent.

title: Are You Missing Out on the Metaverse?
content: Pitches for the future of the internet are banking on an old trick: FOMO.
en_title: Are You Missing Out on the Metaverse?
en_content: Pitches for the future of the internet are banking on an old trick: FOMO.

title: At the Radio City Christmas Show, Some Workers Worry About Covid Rules
content: Employees must all be vaccinated, but some are upset that the upcoming show is not also testing them for the virus, as is done on Broadway and at other major performing venues.
en_title: At the Radio City Christmas Show, Some Workers Worry About Covid Rules
en_content: Employees must all be vaccinated, but some are upset that the upcoming show is not also testing them for the virus, as is done on Broadway and at other major performing venues.

title: Pfizer’s Covid vaccine could break sales records again next year.
content: For two years in a row, the company is on track to bring in more single-year revenue from the shots than any other medical product in history.
en_title: Pfizer’s Covid vaccine could break sales records again next year.
en_content: For two years in a row, the company is on track to bring in more single-year revenue from the shots than any other medical product in history.

title: The Mark Zuckerberg Aesthetic
content: With his plans for a virtual reality metaverse, the Facebook founder pitches himself as a cultural impresario of the internet’s future.
en_title: The Mark Zuckerberg Aesthetic
en_content: With his plans for a virtual reality metaverse, the Facebook founder pitches himself as a cultural impresario of the internet’s future.

title: Widespread Coronavirus Infection Found in Iowa Deer, New Study Says
content: The analysis by Penn State and Iowa researchers strongly indicates that deer are getting the virus from humans, worrying experts about a deep wild reservoir for the virus.
en_title: Widespread Coronavirus Infection Found in Iowa Deer, New Study Says
en_content: The analysis by Penn State and Iowa researchers strongly indicates that deer are getting the virus from humans, worrying experts about a deep wild reservoir for the virus.

title: Justice Dept. Sues Penguin Random House Over Simon & Schuster Deal
content: The Biden administration’s rejection of the proposed $2.18 billion publishing merger reflects a changing atmosphere in Washington toward consolidation.

en_title: Justice Dept. Sues Penguin Random House Over Simon & Schuster Deal
en_content: The Biden administration’s rejection of the proposed $2.18 billion publishing merger reflects a changing atmosphere in Washington toward consolidation.

title: Opioid Makers Win Major Victory in California Trial
content: In one of the first cases to be brought against drug manufacturers over the crisis, a judge ruled that there was “simply no evidence” the companies were liable in the epidemic.
en_title: Opioid Makers Win Major Victory in California Trial
en_content: In one of the first cases to be brought against drug manufacturers over the crisis, a judge ruled that there was “simply no evidence” the companies were liable in the epidemic.

title: Elon Musk says Tesla has not signed a deal with Hertz yet.
content: Hertz had said that it would convert more than 20 percent of its rental fleet to Tesla’s cars, a deal that helped propel Tesla’s stock value beyond $1 trillion for the first time.
en_title: Elon Musk says Tesla has not signed a deal with Hertz yet.
en_content: Hertz had said that it would convert more than 20 percent of its rental fleet to Tesla’s cars, a deal that helped propel Tesla’s stock value beyond $1 trillion for the first time.

title: Funding for start-ups founded by women is surging.
content: Women raised almost twice as much venture capital funding in the first nine months of this year as they did in 2020 or 2019.
en_title: Funding for start-ups founded by women is surging.
en_content: Women raised almost twice as much venture capital funding in the first nine months of this year as they did in 2020 or 2019.

title: As U.S. Reopening Approaches, Travelers Take Their Marks
content: The end of the U.S. ban on international visitors has kicked off a surge in travel both foreign and domestic. Here’s what to expect for the holiday season and beyond.
en_title: As U.S. Reopening Approaches, Travelers Take Their Marks
en_content: The end of the U.S. ban on international visitors has kicked off a surge in travel both foreign and domestic. Here’s what to expect for the holiday season and beyond.

title: How Greek Islands Are Labs for Clean Energy
content: Many Greek islands are being used for innovative experiments to drive the clean power shift.

en_content: Many Greek islands are being used for innovative experiments to drive the clean power shift.

title: A cryptocurrency inspired by ‘Squid Game’ crashes. The industry has questions.
content: The digital money, called Squid, began trading last week for a penny. It soared spectacularly, before the money vanished.
en_title: A cryptocurrency inspired by ‘Squid Game’ crashes. The industry has questions.

title: Attack Left Flight Attendant With Concussion and Facial Injury, Authorities Say
content: The chief executive of American Airlines called the violent encounter on a California-bound flight from New York last week “one of the worst displays of unruly behavior we’ve ever witnessed.”
en_title: Attack Left Flight Attendant With Concussion and Facial Injury, Authorities Say

title: PG&E says it faces a federal inquiry and $1.15 billion in losses over the Dixie fire.
content: The California utility already faces state criminal charges over the blaze this year, the second largest wildfire ever recorded in the state.
en_title: PG&E says it faces a federal inquiry and $1.15 billion in losses over the Dixie fire.
en_content: The California utility already faces state criminal charges over the blaze this year, the second largest wildfire ever recorded in the state.

title: Even as Biden Pushes Clean Energy, He Seeks More Oil Production
content: President Biden acknowledged “it seems like an irony” that he is asking energy-rich nations to boost oil production as he implores the world to tackle climate change.

des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: Even as Biden Pushes Clean Energy, He Seeks More Oil Production

title: Changing of the Guard at Williamstown Theater Festival
content: Mandy Greenfield has resigned and Jenny Gersten will be interim artistic director. The festival gave no reason for the move, but it follows complaints about working conditions.
en_title: Changing of the Guard at Williamstown Theater Festival
en_content: Mandy Greenfield has resigned and Jenny Gersten will be interim artistic director. The festival gave no reason for the move, but it follows complaints about working conditions.

title: Regulators Ask Congress to Create New Rules for Cryptocurrencies
content: A Treasury Department report says stablecoin issuers should operate like banks to avoid destabilizing runs that could erode financial stability.

en_title: Regulators Ask Congress to Create New Rules for Cryptocurrencies
en_content: A Treasury Department report says stablecoin issuers should operate like banks to avoid destabilizing runs that could erode financial stability.

title: Amazon to Launch First Two Internet Satellites in 2022
content: Competing with SpaceX, OneWeb and others, the e-commerce titan will rely on small rockets to get prototypes of its satellite constellation into space.
en_title: Amazon to Launch First Two Internet Satellites in 2022
en_content: Competing with SpaceX, OneWeb and others, the e-commerce titan will rely on small rockets to get prototypes of its satellite constellation into space.

title: The Biden administration will publish vaccine mandate rules ‘in the coming days.’
content: The Labor Department has completed a draft of an emergency standard, which is under review. When it is released, a flurry of corporate vaccine mandates is expected to follow.
en_title: The Biden administration will publish vaccine mandate rules ‘in the coming days.’
en_content: The Labor Department has completed a draft of an emergency standard, which is under review. When it is released, a flurry of corporate vaccine mandates is expected to follow.
